case_title: JOSEPH PICCININI, VS. PATRICK DEPONTE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOSEPH PICCININI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARITAL TRUST AND SURVIVING SPOUSE'S TRUST OF THE PICCININI FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 381 BROADWAY STREET, #39, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94111, **ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS INCLUDED**
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH PICCININI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARITAL TRUST AND SURVIVING SPOUSE'S TRUST OF THE PICCININI FAMILY TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH PICCININI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARITAL TRUST AND SURVIVING SPOUSE'S TRUST OF THE PICCININI FAMILY TRUST SERVED APR-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DEPONTE, PATRICK
